title: How to Handle File Format Restrictions (e.g., MP3) in Speakatoo's API?
excerpt: I’m working on a widget and need to manage file format restrictions, particularly the MP3 requirement, when integrating Speakatoo’s API. What are the best practices or recommended approaches to handle such file format co…

posts.author: jhon001 (Jhon Wick)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m working on a widget and need to manage file format restrictions, particularly the MP3 requirement, when integrating Speakatoo’s API. What are the best practices or recommended approaches to handle such file format constraints effectively? Any insights or examples would be appreciated.
